# Stellar Nurseries: Incubators of Faith
## Scripture
"For you created my inmost being; you knit me together in my mother’s womb. I praise you because I am fearfully and wonderfully made; your works are wonderful, I know that full well." - Psalm 139:13-14

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the celestial wonders that surround us. Stellar nurseries, regions of space where new stars are born, are a testament to God's creative power. Just as these nurseries incubate the formation of new stars, our lives are nurtured and grown in the womb of God's love. We're fearfully and wonderfully made, crafted with precision and care, and equipped with unique gifts and talents to shine in the world.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, we marvel at the beauty of stellar nurseries, where new stars are born. May we recognize the same creative power at work in our lives, nurturing and guiding us to become the people you've designed us to be. Help us to trust in your loving care, to embrace our uniqueness, and to shine as lights in the world, reflecting your glory and love to all those around us. Amen.
